info.description: Weekly Cosmic Forecast. Summary version for website, full version on Substack.

summary.description: 300-word summary version for website (NOT the full Substack version) — LEGACY field, hidden. Edit summary_v2 instead.

summary_v2.description: 300-word summary version for website (NOT the full Substack version). Select text and click the link icon to add a hyperlink — a popup will ask you for the URL. Bold, italic, headings, lists and quotes all work from the toolbar.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override
